sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n47101" key="h(miqh=ta" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἡμι-θῆτα</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n47101.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">half-theta</tr_>, a musical note, <*>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2135.tlg001:13" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alyp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">13</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
